creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
I need to learn to read the PR more properly...  The clang version was
in there.  However, can you try compiling without any special CFLAGS, I
believe you've manually put -O3 in there?  Just to get more data points.
 Also, attached the mentioned files (in the transcript) to the PR, if at
all possible.
Regards!
-- 
Niclas Zeising
